seo_title: MIT Researchers Develop AI-Driven Approach for Planning Complex…
meta_description: A new hybrid system helps robots navigate in changing environments and increases efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
body_html:
A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams. MIT researchers have developed a generative artificial intelligence-driven approach for planning long-term visual tasks, like robot navigation, that is about twice as effective as some existing techniques.

Key Benefits

  • Average success rate of 70% in generating plans
  • Outperforms baseline methods by 40%
  • Can solve new problems it hasn’t encountered before

Technical Details

ComponentDescription
Vision-language modelPerceives the scenario in an image and simulates actions needed to reach a goal
Planning softwareComputes a plan to achieve the goal using the simulated actions

Limitations and Future Work

A two-step system that generates plans with an average success rate of 70%.

The researchers believe their framework combines the advantages of vision-language models and formal solvers, making it well-suited for real-life applications.

Read Time: 8 minutes

source.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
source.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
